# Studio Plaisted

> Studio Plaisted is an architecture and interiors practice based in East Fremantle, Perth, Western Australia. Founded and led by registered architect Fiona Plaisted.

## About

Studio Plaisted is a sole-practitioner architecture practice offering residential and commercial design services across Perth and Western Australia. The practice was established in 2026 by Fiona Plaisted, a registered architect with over a decade of experience working across award-winning cultural, residential, multi-residential and educational projects in Australia.

Fiona holds a Master of Architecture (Hons) from RMIT University, a Diploma of Building Design from Central Institute of Technology, and is a member of the Australian Institute of Architects (RAIA). Registration number: 3828.

## Services

Studio Plaisted offers two main service pathways:

### Concept + Costing Package
A fixed-fee service delivering a builder-ready concept design with reliable cost information. Includes site analysis, concept design, and indicative costing. Suitable for clients wanting clarity and confidence before committing to a full project.

### Full Architectural Services
A comprehensive nine-phase service from discovery through to handover:
1. Discovery
2. Site Analysis + Brief
3. Concept Design
4. Design Development
5. Documentation
6. Approvals
7. Tender
8. Contract Administration
9. Handover

## Location and Contact

- Location: East Fremantle, Western Australia
- Phone: +61 419 924 892
- Email: hello@studioplaisted.com
- Website: https://studioplaisted.com
- Instagram: https://instagram.com/studioplaisted

## Project Types

- Residential architecture (new builds, renovations, additions)
- Commercial architecture
- Interior design
- Heritage and adaptive reuse
- Multi-residential

## Areas Served

Perth metropolitan area and broader Western Australia, including but not limited to: East Fremantle, Fremantle, South Fremantle, North Fremantle, Cottesloe, Mosman Park, Nedlands, Claremont, Subiaco, South Perth, Victoria Park, Mount Lawley, Leederville, and surrounding suburbs.
